name: smartprompting
description: React-aware prompt enhancer for AI coding assistants

chatParticipants.name: smartprompt
chatParticipants.description: Expand a rough React prompt into a precise, stack-aware one

smartprompting.provider.description: AI provider used to generate clarifying questions and expand prompts. Changing this does not change smartprompting.model automatically — set a model valid for the new provider, or leave it blank to use that provider's default.

smartprompting.apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider. Leave blank to run 'SmartPrompting: Set API Key' on first use, or to fall back to an environment variable (GEMINI_API_KEY/GOOGLE_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, matching the provider).

smartprompting.model.description: Model ID for the selected provider. Leave blank for the default: gemini-2.5-flash, gpt-4.1-mini, or claude-opus-4-8.

smartprompting.maxQuestions.description: Max clarifying questions to ask before expanding the prompt. Set to 0 to always skip straight to expansion.

smartprompting.docGrounding.description: Fetch current README excerpts for the detected library versions and include them when expanding the prompt. Improves accuracy for fast-moving libraries, but adds a few seconds of latency and extra tokens per Enhance.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
